event: Stone bridge over a river in a French village in autumn
description: A vibrant landscape painting depicting a stone arched bridge spanning a calm river in the French village of Labastide du Vert. Stone houses with red and brown roofs nestle behind trees on the far bank. The trees display rich autumn foliage in gold, orange, and green. The river water reflects the bridge arches and surrounding vegetation in warm tones. The painting style is Post-Impressionist with visible, textured brushwork creating a luminous, dappled effect throughout. The overall palette is warm golds, greens, and earth tones.

_meta.title: The Bridge in Labastide du Vert
